chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-7107 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 27.08.2025 Ch. Azhar Elahi, advocate for NBP Ms. Wajiha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General --------- This is an old petition of 2022. It was last taken up on 13.12.2022, which is almost 03 years ago. In the last 03 years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition and the question of maintainability still remains outstanding. Today, despite the lapse of over 03 years, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
